nasb.text: The Lord said to Moses, “How long will this people spurn Me? And how long will they not believe in Me, despite all the signs which I have performed in their midst?

esv.text: And the Lord said to Moses, “How long will this people despise me? And how long will they not believe in me, in spite of all the signs that I have done among them?

cnv.text: 耶和華對摩西說：“這民藐視我要到幾時呢？我雖然在他們中間行了這些神蹟，他們還是不信我要到幾時呢？

ccb.text: 耶和华对摩西说：“这些人藐视我要到何时呢？我在他们中间行了这么多神迹，他们仍然不相信我。
